# Solana Launchpad UI

> Token launchpad UI template inspired by pump.fun — zero dependencies, pure HTML/CSS/JS

## Overview

Static design template for a Solana token launchpad. Dark theme, neon green accent, responsive. 4 pages: Board, Create, Trade, Profile. Mock data only — no blockchain integration.

## Files

- index.html — Token board with grid, tabs, King of the Hill banner, activity ticker
- create.html — Token creation form with image upload and social links
- token.html — Token detail with SVG chart, buy/sell panel, holders, thread
- profile.html — User profile with portfolio and activity history
- styles.css — Complete dark theme stylesheet with CSS custom properties
- app.js — Mock token data and DOM interactions
- vercel.json — Vercel deployment config with security headers

## Tech

Pure HTML5, CSS3, vanilla JavaScript. Zero npm dependencies. Google Fonts (Inter). Responsive breakpoints at 480px, 768px, 1024px.

## Customization

Edit CSS variables in styles.css :root — --green, --bg, --bg-card, --text, etc.
Replace mock data arrays in app.js with real API calls.

## Deploy

Works on Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, or any static host. No build step.

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/nirholas/solana-launchpad-ui
- Pump SDK: https://github.com/nirholas/pump-fun-sdk
- Inspired by: https://pump.fun
